name: Public-to-Private DB without auth
description: Database in PRIVATE zone accessible from PUBLIC zone without auth
remediation: Enable mutual TLS
Require auth_required=true on all edges to DB
check: [n for n in G.nodes if G.nodes[n]['type'] == 'database' and G.nodes[n]['zone'] == 'PRIVATE' and any(G.nodes[s]['zone'] == 'PUBLIC' and not G.edges[s, n]['auth_required'] for s in G.predecessors(n))]

name: Admin panel node in PUBLIC zone
description: Admin panel detected in PUBLIC zone
remediation: Move admin panel to PRIVATE or RESTRICTED zone
check: [n for n in G.nodes if 'admin' in G.nodes[n]['name'].lower() and G.nodes[n]['zone'] == 'PUBLIC']

name: No encryption on sensitive data
description: Encryption is NONE for HIGH/CRITICAL sensitivity node
remediation: Enable AES-256 or TLS-1.3 encryption
check: [n for n in G.nodes if G.nodes[n]['encryption_type'] == 'NONE' and G.nodes[n]['data_sensitivity'] in ['HIGH', 'CRITICAL']]

name: Admin edge without auth
description: Port 22 or 3389 edge without auth_required
remediation: Enable mandatory authentication for management ports
check: [u for u, v in G.edges if G.edges[u, v]['port'] in [22, 3389] and not G.edges[u, v]['auth_required']]

name: Wildcard IAM role
description: Wildcard '*:*' detected in iam_roles
remediation: Apply principle of least privilege
check: [n for n in G.nodes if '*:*' in G.nodes[n].get('iam_roles', [])]

name: Unencrypted DB edge
description: HTTP edge to database detected
remediation: Force HTTPS/TLS for all database connections
check: [u for u, v in G.edges if G.nodes[v]['type'] == 'database' and G.edges[u, v]['protocol'] == 'HTTP']

name: Critical sensitivity in PUBLIC zone
description: Node with CRITICAL sensitivity located in PUBLIC zone
remediation: Move critical resources to RESTRICTED zone
check: [n for n in G.nodes if G.nodes[n]['data_sensitivity'] == 'CRITICAL' and G.nodes[n]['zone'] == 'PUBLIC']

name: RDP exposure DMZ to PRIVATE
description: RDP port 3389 open from DMZ to PRIVATE
remediation: Use a VPN or Bastion host for RDP access
check: [u for u, v in G.edges if G.edges[u, v]['port'] == 3389 and G.nodes[u]['zone'] == 'DMZ' and G.nodes[v]['zone'] == 'PRIVATE']

name: DB with no incoming auth
description: Database node has edges with no authentication required
remediation: Enable auth on all ingress edges to database
check: [n for n in G.nodes if G.nodes[n]['type'] == 'database' and any(not G.edges[s, n]['auth_required'] for s in G.predecessors(n))]

name: Untrusted edge to PRIVATE
description: UNTRUSTED trust level edge into PRIVATE zone
remediation: Increase trust level or add additional validation
check: [u for u, v in G.edges if G.edges[u, v]['trust_level'] == 'UNTRUSTED' and G.nodes[v]['zone'] == 'PRIVATE']

name: API without TLS
description: API node not using TLS encryption
remediation: Implement TLS-1.2 or TLS-1.3 for API endpoints
check: [n for n in G.nodes if G.nodes[n]['type'] == 'api' and G.nodes[n]['encryption_type'] not in ['TLS-1.3', 'RSA-2048', 'ECC']]

name: Wildcard Resource IAM
description: IAM role uses wildcard '*' resource
remediation: Scope IAM resources to specific ARNs
check: [n for n in G.nodes if any(':*' in role for role in G.nodes[n].get('iam_roles', []))]

name: Unencrypted Cache
description: Cache node with NONE encryption and HIGH sensitivity
remediation: Enable encryption at rest for cache clusters
check: [n for n in G.nodes if G.nodes[n]['type'] == 'cache' and G.nodes[n]['encryption_type'] == 'NONE' and G.nodes[n]['data_sensitivity'] == 'HIGH']

name: MQ in PUBLIC zone
description: Message Queue accessible from PUBLIC zone
remediation: Move Message Queue to RESTRICTED zone
check: [n for n in G.nodes if G.nodes[n]['type'] == 'message_queue' and G.nodes[n]['zone'] == 'PUBLIC']

name: LB in PRIVATE zone
description: Load balancer placed in PRIVATE zone
remediation: Relocate LB to DMZ or PUBLIC zone
check: [n for n in G.nodes if G.nodes[n]['type'] == 'load_balancer' and G.nodes[n]['zone'] == 'PRIVATE']

name: SSH exposed to PUBLIC
description: SSH port 22 open to PUBLIC zone
remediation: Disable direct SSH from internet; use VPN
check: [u for u, v in G.edges if G.edges[u, v]['port'] == 22 and G.nodes[u]['zone'] == 'PUBLIC']

name: Long retention with weak encryption
description: Database with >5 years retention and RSA encryption
remediation: Upgrade to Quantum-Resistant encryption (ML-KEM)
check: [n for n in G.nodes if G.nodes[n]['type'] == 'database' and G.nodes[n]['retention_years'] > 5 and 'RSA' in G.nodes[n]['encryption_type']]

name: DMZ server with no firewall
description: Server in DMZ has no incoming edge from a firewall
remediation: Ensure all DMZ traffic passes through a firewall
check: [n for n in G.nodes if G.nodes[n]['zone'] == 'DMZ' and G.nodes[n]['type'] == 'server' and not any(G.nodes[s]['type'] == 'firewall' for s in G.predecessors(n))]

name: Unknown outbound HTTPS
description: Outbound HTTPS from PRIVATE zone to PUBLIC
remediation: Restrict egress traffic to approved destinations
check: [u for u, v in G.edges if G.edges[u, v]['protocol'] == 'HTTPS' and G.nodes[u]['zone'] == 'PRIVATE' and G.nodes[v]['zone'] == 'PUBLIC']

name: Latest container tag
description: Container image using ':latest' tag
remediation: Use specific immutable image tags
check: [n for n in G.nodes if G.nodes[n]['type'] == 'container' and G.nodes[n]['container_image'] and (':latest' in G.nodes[n]['container_image'] or ':' not in G.nodes[n]['container_image'])]
